figures.caption: Fig. 3: The graphs GC and GT , respectively in black and red, induce five clusters C1, C2, C3, C4, C5 with V1 := {1, 2, 3, 4}, V2 := {6}, V3 := {7, 8}, V4 := {5, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13} and V5 := {14, 15, 16}.

Fig. 4: (a) State and estimated trajectories; initial states are represented by crosses, terminal state by dots. The pink and green regions represent the evolution over time of the upper bounds on the state estimation errors guaranteed by the k-hop PPSO; red circles denote the target regions of the individual tasks. (b) Evolution of the disagreement components on the estimates performed by agent 2; the dashed lines are the prescribed performance functions of the k-hop PPSO. (c) Evolution of the norm of the state estimation errors performed by agent 2. (d) Minimum estimated robustness of ϕ2. (e) Robustness of the tasks in ϕ2 evaluated using the true state.
